subcodes.first_line: The Ever-Abiding One hath come, and He Who standeth firm was verily standing before the Gate. We declared: "Thou art the Promised One!" He responded: "Nay, by thy life!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی القیوم و القائم قد کان قائما لدی الباب قلنا انک انت الموعود قال لا و نفسک
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @the Twelfth Imam; the Qa'im, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
